sqlCommand.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Crcy,Flex2,Flex3,Date1,Period,Rate1,Flex4,Amt2,Amt3,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7) (select '[batchID]','''01',r.Crcy,'USD','M','[yyyy-mm-dd]',0,round(1/r.rate/c.xfactor,5) as rate,'',c.xfactor,1,'','','' from CrcyRates r inner join Crcy c on r.Crcy = c.Crcy where r.Typ = 'S' and r.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]')

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Crcy,Flex2,Flex3,Date1,Period,Rate1,Flex4,Amt2,Amt3,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7) (select '[batchID]','''01',r.Crcy,'USD','MAVG','[yyyy-mm-dd]',0,round(avg(round(1/r.rate/c.xfactor,5)),5) as rate,'',c.xfactor,1,'','','' from CrcyRates r inner join Crcy c on r.Crcy = c.Crcy where r.Typ = 'M' and year(r.EffDate) = '[Yr]' and month(r.EffDate) = '[Mo]' and r.Crcy in ('AUD','BBD','BRL','CAD','EUR','GBP','MXN','SEK','SGD') group by r.Crcy,c.xfactor)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Crcy,Date1,Rate1,Rate2) (select '[batchID]-data2','M',r.Crcy,r.EffDate,r.rate,round(1/r.rate,5) from CrcyRates r inner join Crcy c on r.Crcy = c.Crcy where r.Typ = 'M' and year(r.EffDate) = '[Yr]' and month(r.EffDate) = '[Mo]' and r.Crcy in ('AUD','BBD','BRL','CAD','EUR','GBP','MXN','SEK','SGD'))

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Crcy,Flex2,Flex3,Date1,Period,Rate1,Flex4,Amt2,Amt3,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7) (select '[batchID]','''01',r.Crcy,'USD','Y','[yyyy-mm-dd]',0,round(avg(round(1/r.rate/c.xfactor,5)),5) as rate,'',c.xfactor,1,'','','' from CrcyRates r inner join Crcy c on r.Crcy = c.Crcy where r.Typ = 'M' and year(r.EffDate) = '[Yr]' and r.Crcy in ('AUD','BBD','BRL','CAD','EUR','GBP','MXN','SEK','SGD') group by r.Crcy,c.xfactor)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Crcy,Date1,Rate1,Rate2) (select '[batchID]-data3','M',r.Crcy,r.EffDate,r.rate,round(1/r.rate,5) from CrcyRates r inner join Crcy c on r.Crcy = c.Crcy where r.Typ = 'M' and year(r.EffDate) = '[Yr]' and r.Crcy in ('AUD','BBD','BRL','CAD','EUR','GBP','MXN','SEK','SGD'))
update TransX set Rate1 = 9000 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Crcy = 'TRL'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Crcy,Flex2,Flex3,Date1,Period,Rate1,Flex4,Amt2,Amt3,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7) (select '[batchID]',Flex1,Crcy,Flex2,'S' as Flex3,Date1,Period,Rate1,Flex4,Amt2,Amt3,Flex5,Flex6,Flex7 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Crcy = 'TRL')
delete from CrcyRates where Typ = 'MAVG' and EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]'

insert into CrcyRates (Typ,EffDate,Crcy,Rate) (select 'MAVG','[yyyy-mm-dd]',r.Crcy,1/round(avg(round(1/r.rate,5)),5) from CrcyRates r inner join Crcy c on r.Crcy = c.Crcy where r.Typ = 'M' and year(r.EffDate) = '[Yr]' and month(r.EffDate) = '[Mo]' and r.Crcy in ('AUD','BBD','BRL','CAD','EUR','GBP','MXN','SEK','SGD') group by r.Crcy)

insert into CrcyRates (Typ,EffDate,Crcy,Rate) (select 'MAVG','[yyyy-mm-dd]',Crcy,avg(rate) from CrcyRates where Typ = 'M' and year(EffDate) = '[Yr]' and month(EffDate) = '[Mo]' and not Crcy in ('AUD','BBD','BRL','CAD','EUR','GBP','MXN','SEK','SGD') group by Crcy)
delete from CrcyRates where Typ = 'Y' and EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]'

insert into CrcyRates (Typ,EffDate,Crcy,Rate) (select 'Y','[yyyy-mm-dd]',r.Crcy,1/round(avg(round(1/r.rate,5)),5) from CrcyRates r inner join Crcy c on r.Crcy = c.Crcy where r.Typ = 'M' and year(r.EffDate) = '[Yr]' and r.Crcy in ('AUD','BBD','BRL','CAD','EUR','GBP','MXN','SEK','SGD') group by r.Crcy)

insert into CrcyRates (Typ,EffDate,Crcy,Rate) (select 'Y','[yyyy-mm-dd]',Crcy,avg(rate) from CrcyRates where Typ = 'M' and year(EffDate) = '[Yr]' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]' and not Crcy in ('AUD','BBD','BRL','CAD','EUR','GBP','MXN','SEK','SGD') group by Crcy)
